title: stillingia obovata
intro: Stillingia obovata, also known as Queen's Root, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to its presence of saponins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Stillingia obovata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatic pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Stillingia obovata is often used in tinctures, teas, and salves, which can be used topically to soothe skin irritations and internally to support overall health and well-being.
